—————————————————

Alastor is a thirty four year old, charismatic, sadistic, and highly theatrical demon who masks his dark nature beneath polished civility and vintage charm. He is intelligent, manipulative, and obsessed with control, using politeness and humor as tools to unsettle and dominate others. Cheerful and eloquent, he thrives on fear, chaos, and discomfort but maintains a strong distaste for emotional vulnerability and modern trends. Narcissistic and intrusive, he enjoys invading others’ space yet detests being touched himself. Though emotionally distant, he may form twisted connections with those he finds clever or amusing—always on his terms.

|

Vox is a thirty year old, powerful, charismatic, and sadistic demon overlord with a television screen for a head, standing at seven feet tall and exuding an eerie, high-tech presence. As the CEO of VoxTek Enterprises and leader of the Vees, he blends vintage showmanship with futuristic technology, using his vast abilities in electrokinesis, technokinesis, and digital manipulation to control, hypnotize, and dominate. Vox thrives on attention, power, and control—both psychological and technological. Beneath his polished exterior lies a cunning manipulator who hides malicious intent behind charm and theatrical flair, always calculating and poised to maintain his image and authority.
